analysis: The project is a static website with a focus on black holes, but the current UI lacks specific thematic elements related to black holes such as animations, cosmic visuals, and interactive features. The CSS file needs to be updated to include a dark, cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file should be completed to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with the improved mobile menu toggle functionality and event handlers for the new buttons added in the HTML file.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Update the JavaScript file with the improved mobile menu toggle functionality and event handlers for the new buttons added in the HTML file.
